use_cases: Displaying team members and contributors on an About or project page
Showcasing leadership and staff structure with avatars and roles
Presenting team sections in portfolios or open-source project documentation
ai_summary: A responsive team section component displaying members with circular avatars, names, and roles in a grid layout. Organized into Leadership and Engineering groups with a clean flat design, subtle borders, and shadows. Works across desktop and mobile with adaptive grid columns.
